title: Simple Performance
description: Dead simple performance pack with Simple Voice Chat added.
body:
# Simple Performance
Simple Performance is just that -- performance that is simple.

## Overview
This is a modpack that is made specifically for Minecraft players who don't have the best PCs that still want to enjoy the fun and chaos that Simple Voice Chat mod offers.

I (the modpack maker) originally made this pack because I couldn't find a modpack that is built for less performant PCs while also having Simple Voice Chat mod. I have friends who play with me on servers that have SVC installed, but all other modpacks with SVC mod included had a lot of other mods which would cause them to lag.

## Why this modpack?
Simply put, it's perfect for Minecrafters who have lower-end PCs that also want to play on servers with Simple Voice Mod.

## Features
* Simple Voice Chat mod.
* Lightweight and optimized.
* In-Game Account Switcher mod.
  * So you don't have to restart to reauthenticate with Mojang.
* Very Simple.

## Authors
- Drak
- Included contributing mod developers
